Moving on up

November 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

Uplink newsletter is increasing its subscription price in January after doubling in size this year, with new pricing of $40 for IRE members and $60 for nonmembers.

The price of Uplink will increase in January. The newsletter, which has grown from eight pages to 16 pages this year, will cost $40 for one year for IRE members and $60 for nonmembers. Annual institutional subscriptions are now available for $250. To beat the rate increase, subscribe before year's end at the current price of $35.
